revision.text:
[[ja:稲代坐神社]] {{Expand Japanese|稲代坐神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inashironimasu Shrine | native_name = 稲代坐神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inashironimasu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.470399|135.763385}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Toyouke-hime|lt=Toyōke Ōmikami|bcl|Toyoukebime|en|Toyouke-hime|es|Toyouke Ōmikami|fr|Toyouke Ōmikami|ja|トヨウケビメ|ru|Тоёукэ бимэ|simple|Toyōke Ōmikami|sv|Toyouke Ōmikami|zh|豐宇氣毘賣神|qid=Q2983724|1=Toyouke-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Inashironimasu Shrine'''|稲代坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Q134917288|ltq=Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 162 ** P155: {{ill|Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine|lt=Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine|ja|甘樫坐神社|qid=Q11574285|1=Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q38278497|ltq=Q38278497|qid=Q38278497|1=Musanimasu Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|lt=Kashihara|ar|كاشيهارا (نارا)|azb|کاشیهارا، نارا|ca|Kashihara|ceb|Kashihara-shi (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Касихара|cs|Kašihara|de|Kashihara|devoyage|Kashihara|en|Kashihara, Nara|envoyage|Kashihara|eo|Kaŝihara|es|Kashihara (Nara)|eu|Kashihara (Nara)|fa|کاشیهارا، نارا|fi|Kashihara|fr|Kashihara|gl|Kashihara|hy|Կաշիհարա|id|Kashihara, Nara|it|Kashihara|ja|橿原市|javoyage|橿原市|ko|가시하라시|ms|Kashihara, Nara|mzn|کاشیهارا، نارا|nl|Kashihara|no|Kashihara|pl|Kashihara|pt|Kashihara|ro|Kashihara|ru|Касихара|sh|Kashihara|simple|Kashihara, Nara|sr|Кашихара|sv|Kashihara|tg|Кашиҳара|th|คาชิฮาระ|tl|Kashihara, Nara|tr|Kashihara|tt|Касихара|uk|Касіхара|ur|کاشی ہارا، نارا|vi|Kashihara, Nara|war|Kashihara, Nara|zh_classical|橿原市|zh_min_nan|Kasihara-chhī|zh_yue|橿原|zh|橿原市|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} * {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Q1117901|ltq=Q1117901|qid=Q1117901|1=Takaichi District, Nara}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.470399|135.763385}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q2983724|ltq=Q2983724|qid=Q2983724|1=Toyouke-hime}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041123011107/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22812 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180821 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * イナシロ- == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8150005004866 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県橿原市一町502', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '奈良県橿原市一町南常門打鳥居', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:稲代坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594637}} == Japanese content == {{Multiple issues |Reference method=December 2017 |Single source=December 2017 }} {{Shinto shrine |Name=Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine
(Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine) |Image={{Image requested|cat=Kashihara City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |Location={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara City|Q496319|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Ichimachi 502 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 28 | Latitude seconds = 13 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 47 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Map country code = JP |Enshrined deity={{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|UNKNOWN|lt=Toyouke-hime no Mikoto}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded=Unknown |Main hall={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} cypress bark roofing |Alternative name=Uchitōri-no-miya |Annual festival={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} |Map= Japan Nara }} '''Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine''' (いなしろにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara City|Q496319|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (major shrine)|Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown, but in the *Shinshō Chokaku Fushō* it is recorded in the first year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}) as “Inashiro Shrine, one household,” indicating that it was already enshrined more than 1,180 years ago. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as a major shrine and is noted as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals ({{ill|lt=hōhei|Q11445508|qid=Q11445508|1=Hōhei}}). === Divine rank === * 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an|1=Ten'an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}) {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}: Promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}*) — recorded as “Inashiro Shrine.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} === External links === * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031306-01.html |title=Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine |date=20181001131640}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inashironimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]
